Tools & Software

Open-source tools for mass spectrometry-based proteomics, developed by the CompOmics group at VIB-UGent.

All tools are freely available under permissive licences. Source code is on GitHub.

Prediction
⏱️

DeepLC

Retention time

Predicts when peptides will elute from the LC column during a mass spectrometry run. Handles modified peptides accurately — even modifications never seen during training. Adapts to new instruments and setups through transfer learning, requiring only a small number of example peptides.

⬡ GitHub Docs PyPI Web app

Bouwmeester et al. (2021). DeepLC can predict retention times for peptides that carry as-yet unseen modifications. Nature Methods. 10.1038/s41592-021-01301-5
Bouwmeester, Nameni et al. (2026). Transfer learning in DeepLC improves LC retention time prediction. Nature Communications. 10.1038/s41467-026-68981-5

Developers
RB

Robbin Bouwmeester

Lead developer

Ralf Gabriels

SD

Sven Degroeve

Contributor

📊

MS²PIP

Fragment intensity

Predicts fragment ion peak intensities from peptide sequence alone. Used to build in silico spectral libraries and to power the MS²Rescore rescoring pipeline. Fine-tuning for user-defined modifications is available through MS²DIP.

⬡ GitHub Web app

Degroeve & Martens (2013). MS²PIP: a tool for MS/MS peak intensity prediction. Bioinformatics. 10.1093/bioinformatics/btt355

Developers
SD

Sven Degroeve

Original author

AD

Arthur Declercq

Lead developer

💨

IM2Deep

Ion mobility

Predicts collisional cross-section (CCS) values for peptides, including multiply modified ones. Enables confident ion mobility filtering in DDA and DIA workflows.

⬡ GitHub

Declercq et al. (2024). IM2Deep: predicting collisional cross sections for multi-modified peptides. Journal of Proteome Research. 10.1021/acs.jproteome.4c00098

Developers
AD

Arthur Declercq

Lead developer

RB

Robbin Bouwmeester

Contributor

Rescoring
🏆

MS²Rescore

PSM rescoring

Rescores peptide-spectrum matches by combining predicted LC-MS/MS features — retention time, fragment intensities, and ion mobility — with observed features. Substantially increases the number of confident identifications compared to search engine scores alone. Validated for immunopeptidomics and metaproteomics.

⬡ GitHub Docs

Declercq et al. (2022). MS²Rescore: data-driven rescoring dramatically boosts immunopeptide identification rates. Molecular & Cellular Proteomics. 10.1016/j.mcpro.2022.100266

Developers
RG

Ralf Gabriels

Lead developer

AD

Arthur Declercq

Contributor

Data Standards & Utilities
🔧

psm_utils

PSM handling

A Python library for parsing, converting, and handling peptide-spectrum matches from any major search engine. Provides a unified PSM object model and format-agnostic I/O for building analysis pipelines.

⬡ GitHub Docs PyPI
Developers
RG

Ralf Gabriels

Lead developer

🗂️

lesSDRF

Metadata

An interactive desktop app for annotating proteomics experiments in the SDRF format. Guides users through ontology-compliant metadata entry. HAMLET extends this with LLM-based pre-filling from manuscript text.

⬡ GitHub Web app

Van Puyvelde et al. (2022). lesSDRF: a desktop app for SDRF proteomics metadata annotation. Journal of Proteome Research. 10.1021/acs.jproteome.2c00120

Developers
SV

Sander Van Puyvelde

Lead developer

📂

Thermo Raw File Parser

File conversion

Converts Thermo .raw files to open formats (mzML, MGF, or Parquet) on Windows, macOS, and Linux. Widely used as a preprocessing step in proteomics pipelines.

⬡ GitHub

Hulstaert et al. (2020). ThermoRawFileParser: modular, scalable, and cross-platform RAW file conversion. Journal of Proteome Research. 10.1021/acs.jproteome.9b00328

Developers
NH

Niels Hulstaert

Lead developer

Taxonomy & Metaproteomics
🌿

Unipept

Metaproteomics

Tryptic peptide-based functional and taxonomic analysis of metaproteome samples. Exposes a public API handling millions of queries per month. Integrates with major proteomics workflows via Python and R clients.

⬡ GitHub Web app API docs

Mesuere et al. (2012). Unipept: tryptic peptide-based biodiversity analysis of metaproteome samples. Journal of Proteome Research. 10.1021/pr300576s

Developers
BM

Bart Mesuere

Lead developer

TV

Tibo Vande Moortele

Contributor

🎲

Peptonizer2000

Taxonomy

Provides probabilistic taxon confidence scores for metaproteomics using a Bayesian network approach. Propagates peptide-level evidence into organism-level posteriors, giving statistically grounded taxon assignments in complex microbial community samples.

⬡ GitHub
Developers
TV

Tibo Vande Moortele

Lead developer
